title: NodeInfo 2.0: accurate usage stats, correct schema
description:
Implement /.well-known/nodeinfo (link document) and /nodeinfo/2.0 (data). users.total is hardcoded to 1 regardless of persona count (intentional — don't leak persona count to aggregators). localPosts from COUNT(*) of posts table. software.version from CARGO_PKG_VERSION.

Test discipline:
- Validate response against NodeInfo 2.0 JSON schema (include schema in test as reference)
- Test that users.total is 1 even when 5 personas exist
- Test that localPosts increments after creating a post

Defensive programming:
- openRegistrations: always false — never read from config, hardcoded
- Cache localPosts count (COUNT(*) can be expensive at scale — use approximate or cached value)
acceptance_criteria: Response validates against NodeInfo 2.0 schema; users.total always 1; localPosts accurate; version matches Cargo.toml
